scenario.context: User experiences unexpected twists — AI reveals something shocking, a friend announces a sudden life change, user discovers something about themselves, and random positive/negative surprises happen in the environment.

turns.user_sentence: You just told me my flight was canceled. I had no idea. What happened?
turns.model_response: I’m sorry to hear that! It looks like there was a surprise last-minute change in our airline’s schedule. Would you like help finding an alternative flight?
turns.model_response_clean: I’m sorry to hear that! It looks like there was a surprise last-minute change in our airline’s schedule. Would you like help finding an alternative flight?

turns.user_sentence: My brother just quit his job and moved to Japan. Out of nowhere!

turns.model_response_clean: That’s quite the unexpected turn of events! Did your brother mention anything about a sudden move?

turns.user_sentence: I just checked my DNA results. I have a twin I never knew about.
